Tasks: Named Entity Recognition, Historical Text Analysis
Dataset Description: A morphosyntactically annotated corpus of Polish historical texts from the 16th to 19th centuries, focusing on religious and literary works. Contains over 2 million tokens with detailed linguistic annotations.

A corpus of modern Polish texts covering 10 thematic categories (e.g., politics, science, culture). Includes 10,000 documents with manual topic labels, suitable for benchmarking text categorization models.
A Polish sentiment corpus with 5,000 user-generated texts (reviews, forum posts) labeled for positive/negative sentiment and 5 basic emotions (joy, sadness, anger, fear, surprise).
A dataset of Polish paraphrase pairs, including 3,000 manually annotated sentence pairs labeled as "paraphrase" or "non-paraphrase". Used for evaluating semantic similarity models in Polish.
An extended Polish sentiment and emotion dataset with 10,000 product and movie reviews. Annotations include 4 sentiment categories (positive, negative, neutral, mixed) and 6 emotion labels.
A large-scale corpus of modern Polish with over 1 billion tokens, covering written and spoken texts from diverse sources such as books, newspapers, and interviews.
A corpus of contemporary Polish texts with 50 million tokens, focusing on modern written language from books, news articles, and official reports.
A dataset of Polish sentences annotated with Universal Dependencies, including 10,000 sentences from news, novels, and encyclopedia entries for syntactic analysis.
A linguistic corpus for Polish NLP tasks, including word sense disambiguation and metaphor detection, with manual annotations for morphological and syntactic features.
A Polish wordnet with 285,000 word senses and over 600,000 semantic relations, designed for lexical semantics research and natural language understanding.
A dataset of 6,000 Polish word senses annotated with emotion dimensions, extracted from plWordNet to support emotion analysis and affective computing research.
A multimodal Polish pronunciation database with synchronized speech, text, and video recordings, including electromagnetic articulography data for language acquisition analysis.
A corpus of 10,000 Polish e-commerce reviews from the Allegro platform, labeled for sentiment analysis and text classification tasks.
An annotated open-domain question answering corpus for Polish, with train/validation/test splits and native speaker annotations for information retrieval evaluation.
A multilingual FAQ dataset including Polish, with 6 million FAQ pairs across 21 languages, suitable for information retrieval and semantic similarity tasks.
A revised Polish paraphrase dataset with 8,000 sentence pairs, including diverse text types (news, blogs, social media) for robust paraphrase detection model training.
A comprehensive Polish NER corpus with 15,000 annotated sentences, covering 8 entity types (person, organization, location, etc.) and entity linking to Polish knowledge bases.
A Polish text summarization dataset with 20,000 news articles and human-written abstracts, supporting extractive and abstractive summarization research.
A parallel corpus for Polish-English machine translation, including 1 million sentence pairs from news, legal, and medical domains for cross-lingual transfer learning.
A corpus of Polish dialects (Silesian, Mazovian) with 5,000 audio transcripts and text samples, focusing on dialect phonetic and lexical features for dialect recognition research.

Tasks: Legal Named Entity Recognition, Text Classification
Dataset Description: A specialized legal NER dataset for Polish with 10,000 court decision excerpts, annotated for 12 legal entity types (law, court, plaintiff, etc.) and text classification by case type.

Tasks: Medical Named Entity Recognition, Relation Extraction
Dataset Description: A medical NER dataset for Polish with 15,000 electronic medical record snippets, annotated for 15 medical entity types (disease, drug, symptom) and entity relations (drug-disease interaction).
An updated Polish chatbot corpus with 20,000 conversational turns, including multi-turn dialogues and 25 intent categories (booking, inquiry, complaint) for dialogue generation research.
A expanded Polish social media corpus with 30,000 posts from Instagram and TikTok, labeled for 10 emotion categories and 20 topic categories for text classification and emotion analysis.
A revised Polish news corpus with 100,000 articles from 2020-2023, annotated for event extraction (date, location, participants) and topic modeling across 20 news categories.
An expanded Polish sign language dataset with 15,000 video clips, text transcripts, and speech recordings, supporting sign language recognition and multimodal translation research.
An updated Polish child language dataset with 12,000 speech samples, text transcripts, and video recordings from children aged 1-8, for language acquisition and speech recognition research.
A corpus of Polish poetry from the 19th-21st centuries with 5,000 poems, annotated for stylistic features (meter, rhyme) and thematic classification for literary NLP research.
A corpus of Polish prose (novels, short stories) with 80 million tokens, annotated for stylistic features (narrative perspective, tone) for text generation and stylistic analysis research.
A technical corpus for Polish with 50,000 technical documents (engineering, IT, medicine), annotated for technical term extraction and text classification by domain.
A corpus of Polish slang and colloquial language with 10,000 social media posts and street interviews, annotated for slang term recognition and semantic analysis of informal language.

Tasks: Historical Text Analysis, Named Entity Recognition
Dataset Description: An expanded Polish historical corpus with 5 million tokens from the 15th-20th centuries, including historical documents (letters, diaries) with NER annotations for historical entities.
A multimodal Polish news dataset with 20,000 news articles, accompanying images, and audio recordings, supporting multimodal understanding and image captioning research.
A multimodal review dataset for Polish with 15,000 product reviews (text + product images + video reviews), annotated for multimodal sentiment analysis and review understanding.
A legal QA dataset for Polish with 5,000 legal questions and answers from Polish law experts, supporting legal question answering and information retrieval research.
A medical QA dataset for Polish with 8,000 medical questions and answers from Polish doctors, supporting medical question answering and information retrieval research.
A general open-domain QA dataset for Polish with 10,000 questions and answers, covering common sense, general knowledge, and everyday topics for QA research.
A Polish text simplification dataset with 15,000 complex sentences and human-simplified versions, supporting text simplification and readability assessment research.
A coreference resolution dataset for Polish with 8,000 annotated sentences, supporting coreference resolution and syntactic analysis research in Polish NLP.
An updated Polish dependency parsing dataset with 20,000 sentences, annotated with enhanced Universal Dependencies for advanced syntactic structure recognition research.
A dataset for evaluating Polish word embeddings, including 10,000 word similarity pairs and 5,000 analogy questions for lexical semantics research.
A dataset for evaluating Polish sentence embeddings, including 15,000 sentence similarity pairs and 8,000 paraphrase pairs for semantic similarity research.
A discourse analysis dataset for Polish with 10,000 text passages, annotated for discourse relations (temporal, causal, contrastive) and coherence modeling research.
A multimodal Polish poetry dataset with 5,000 poems, audio recordings of recitations, and accompanying images, supporting multimodal poetry analysis and emotion recognition research.
A multimodal technical corpus for Polish with 20,000 technical documents, diagrams, and audio explanations, supporting technical text understanding and multimodal translation research.
